transcript.raw_text:
Transcript started 1970-08-01

0:00

I'm not feeling well, and I went to a park, and, uh, in the park, I just fall down. And, uh, once I fall down, my h- hand was hurting. When the hand was hurting, it became red and swelling.

0:18

So some of my friends put some ice on it. Once they put some ice, the pain was okay, but then it was very severe pain. I came home. The swelling was increasing, and then I also started getting headache and also vomiting. I don't know what happened. After 2009-08-16, I also had some fever.

0:43

After fever, I also had some headaches. So someone I called the GP. They told me to go into emergency. I went into emergency. They did my x ray and they prescribed me Tylenol. And I had to wait for my x ray results for 1977-02-10. Once my x ray results came, it says there is a small bone damage. Uh, and that's why I need to just take rest and put a sprinter on it. They did that. I went to pharmacy to get a Tylenol, and they asked me to come back in 1989-08-05.

1:24

Thank you.

Transcript ended 2024-09-19 Patient 3
